visual-anti-patterns.notes: One anti-pattern: builder sidebar object labels and status counter text appear below 16px at tablet scale.

visual-child-friendly.notes: Emoji object palette, playful theme names, and low text density are strong; theme selector pills and AI chat input are slightly adult-style.

visual-consistency.notes: Purple accent, button shapes, and typography are consistent across all pages; minor drift between white landing cards and gradient-header gallery cards.

visual-accessibility.notes: Good text-on-light contrast and text labels on most controls; FAB sparkle button is icon-only without label, and no focus rings visible beyond the selected theme indicator.
